data.title: Shopify introduces open standard to enable checkout inside AI search and chat tools
data.description: Shopify said it has co-developed the Universal Commerce Protocol, an open standard created with Google, to allow AI systems to connect to merchants’ checkout flows and complete transactions within conversational interface.

data.title: Google Cloud launches AI platform linking shopping and customer service
data.description: The launch highlights how cloud providers are pushing AI deeper into commerce and service operations, as businesses look for automation that can carry out tasks rather than simply respond to questions.

data.title: Home Depot, Walmart expand Google partnerships as agentic AI reshapes ecommerce
data.description: The announcements, made Jan. 10 at the National Retail Federation’s NRF 2026 conference, show how large retailers are using AI agents to compress discovery, decision-making, ordering and delivery into a single, conversational workflow.

data.title: Lane Bryant to launch drop-shipping program with Rithum
data.description: As the partnership comes together, Lane Bryant will look to realize speed, efficiency and an expanded range of inventory using Rithum's Commerce Solutions network.

data.title: Walmart's Marty agent joins new AI features for retail media network advertisers
data.description: Already in use for Walmart partners, Marty's use is expanding for advertisers that use Walmart Connect.
